subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hearkened to the Call and turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon... from which most of the servants have turned aside [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمع الندآء و اقبل الی الافق الاعلی ... عنه اکثر العباد قد سمعنا
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
